decision: A -스 is required whenever the lexical frame is transitive; aspect, modality, negation, and state do not delete A.

head_marking: head receives external case; possessor is bare
matrix_case_on_head: HEAD-∅ for S/P; HEAD-스 for A
decision: Possession is bare juxtaposition; =겨 is not a possessive linker and possessor does not take ERG as genitive.
Indirective alignment is maintained: theme is ABS and recipient is =겨. Transfer omission remains out of public core.

head_marking: bare ABS if matrix S/P; external case by matrix role
rc_internal_retention: A retained; recipient retained with =겨; theme gapped
matrix_case_on_head: HEAD-∅ in examples; compatible with matrix P under outer verb
decision: Theme/P can be the head; the theme is not resumed inside the relative clause, and the head does not receive =겨 merely because it is relativized.

rc_internal_retention: A retained; interface retained inside RC with =겨
decision: In presentation/mediated-speech frames, theme-head relatives keep the interface NP inside the relative clause with =겨.

head_marking: head-retained =겨 over the head’s matrix core case
rc_internal_retention: A retained; theme retained; interface gapped inside RC
matrix_case_on_head: HEAD-∅=겨 for S/P; HEAD-스=겨 for A if needed
decision: Interface relatives use head-retention with =겨. Bare head, A omission, interface resumptive, missing predicate -겨, and case-after-clitic are rejected.

head_marking: head-retained =겨 over the head’s matrix core case
rc_internal_retention: A retained; theme retained; recipient gapped inside RC
matrix_case_on_head: HEAD-∅=겨 for S/P; HEAD-스=겨 for A
decision: Ordinary recipient-head relatives are now allowed only with head-retained =겨 and overt theme inside the relative clause.

construction: ERG+=겨 boundary and distinct-host multiple FRC
base_frame: A-스=겨 P-∅ V=루 / A-스=겨 THEME-∅ RECIP=겨 코레=루
head_marking: case before clitic on the same host
matrix_case_on_head: A host must be -스=겨, not =겨-스 or bare =겨
allowed: YES for distinct hosts; NO for duplicate same-host =겨
decision: =겨 never replaces core case. Multiple =겨 is allowed only on distinct hosts; core case precedes clitic on each host.

matrix_case_on_head: overt transitive addressee A must be -스
decision: Prohibitive uses ordinary connegative plus NEG with =얀. Positive transitive imperative preserves overt addressee A=-스. Edge clitics =헌/=두 are attested after declarative =루 only in RC3.9 public core.

head_marking: WH.PERSON receives ERG -스 when filling A
decision: WHQ does not suspend core alignment. A-role WH forms take -스, and WH clauses close with =셴 rather than =호 or =루.
